[Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.

Quest Name
Darkforge Breastplate

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

The Overthere
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Solusek Ro


Uploaded September 24th, 2025 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
SK epic 1.0
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2023 at 7:10 AM Rating: Decent
Goregasmic
32 posts
Did this sk epic 1.0 part this week. Made it from 31 to 37 on live while doing it, with a bard 2box and 2 tank mercs. Took me ~5h30 total over 4 sessions. The crusaders and spiritualists drop what you need. The best spot is the spiritualist pillar south of the island. His spawn rate seems a bit higher and I can confirm all 3 lizards around him can spawn a crusader (yes, the back one too) so I'd clear that area every ~13 minutes diligently and then go do more on the ramp/pyramids between respawns, hoping to get additional crusaders.

The 2 southern pyramids and the mobs on the ramp will also spawn crusaders but the rate is like 1 every 8 clearings or something like that, compared to the spiritualist who has like 1 in 4 and a bonus crusader sometimes. So not as good but better than nothing. They drop at least one piece with about a 25-50% chance to drop two.

The crusaders are about the same level as the judicars/heralds/zealots which mostly just spawn on the ramp and southern pyramids. Not sure if the northern 3 pyramids can spawn them as they seem to spawn lower level lizards in general. If you're like me and didn't have the firepower to keep everything down, focus on the spots I mentionned above for greater success but if you greatly outlevel the area I'd just torch everything up for good measure.

Oh and I noticed a lot of people saying helms are the rarest but I got like 4 of them before I got one of some other pieces so RNG gonna RNG. Personally I got Leftleg/helm/BP/visor/Rightleg/chainmail in than order. Bracers, helm and feet were the most common by far but I have seen like 1 glove.

Edited, Aug 29th 2023 8:12am by Goregasmic
▲ Page top
no need for epic
QuoteReply

24 posts
do not need to do the darkforge armor in order to do the epic you can skip it

ok a little lost
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2006 at 9:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782091723
6 posts
the link says found in Temple of sol ro? Why are people farming this stuff in the ferott? is the posting on allah here wrong?
▲ Page top
ok a little lost
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2006 at 9:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1638146087547
Scholar
159 posts
It is worded a bit ackwardly. Sol Ro is where the quest is given and where the turn in is. The Feerott is where the items are being farmed at ... at the fork in the river, North of the CT Zone In, there will be 3 lizzards standing in front of a spire (tree) and 1 lizzard on the other side facing the water. Kill the loner come around tree and kill 3 more ....go back around and wait for repop ...10 minute timer. The Spiritualist or Crusader will drop one or more of all needed items. They are:
a decayed left and right bracer
a decayed left and right boot
a decayed left and right gauntlet
a decayed left and right vambrace
a decayed left and right leg plate (epic)
a decayed Helm (epic)
a decayed visor (epic)
a decayed chainmail (epic)
a decayed breastplate (epic)

Breastplate = 466.
Greaves = 470.
Helmet = 465.

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=466

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=470

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=465

These Allakhazam links will tell the support items that are also needed for each quest.










Edited, Sep 18th 2006 at 2:21pm EDT by Grodie
▲ Page top
RE: ok a little lost
QuoteReply

Scholar
1,087 posts
because it is a quest reward in temple of ro.
The parts to hand in, are dropped in feerrott

Locations
QuoteReply
# May 30 2004 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757035640
View User Forum
Scholar
116 posts
I'm currently trying to complete these quest myself for my SK. My SK is level 65 and I always keep clear the ramp near CT, the 5 surrounding pyramids, the mobs near the bridges off the triangular island, and the 4 mobs where Radiant pops. I have found out, after hours of nonstop bloodshed, that the Crusaders can spawn in any point. I have seem them spawn around each pyramid and around the nothern oblisk. The only spot I haven't seen a Crusader spawn, was the Radiant/Spiritualist spawn, just 3 feet south of the Northern Oblisk. I have seen Spiritualists spawn everywhere on this triangular island exept in the gorilla spawn points. I have all pieces except the breastplate, which I am going to get now.
As far as which pieces drops off who? I have seen all different pieces drop off both the Crusaders and the Spirtualists. Both of those mobs always drops 1 or 2 decayed pieces at a time.
Hope this helps,

Maulrat Stickybuds
65 SK of Rodcet Nife

Edited, Sun May 30 19:17:27 2004

▲ Page top
About to get it
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2003 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362423683
11 posts
Firstly, the Decayed armour appears on Tae ew Spiritulists and Crusaders. I sometimes got two pieces of the Spiritulists.

Next, decayed is No Drop, the Darkforged is Lore only.

Lastly. If you want to solo, try the north point of the island. There are 4 spawn points, one of which is where the spiritulists spawns the most. I started at 34 and am nearing 36 without too much trouble.
▲ Page top
Darkforge Quest
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2003 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256699682
1 post
I'm kinda confused as to where in Feerott i hunt for the Decaying Mail and which lizard i kill. If someone could advise me. I would greatly appreciate it
▲ Page top
RE: Darkforge Quest
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2003 at 10:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255478852
Scholar
54 posts
Kill the Tae Ew Crusaders and Spiritualist. I did this a while ago -- not too long after the CT revamp -- and I found that the spiritualist pops at the pillar where a silvered tae ew observer and radiant can also pop, so keep that spawn cleared, as well as the spawns on/near the pyramids near the CT ramp. I've been told but can not confirm that the crusaders can also spawn at the base of the ramp but in my experience they did not.

Hope this helps!

#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 26 2001 at 4:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) whoever came up with the word uber should be shot, just giving my opinion, its so stupid
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2001 at 7:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770603889
Sage
62 posts
The word uber is a German word that, literally translated, means "over". My opinion is that it's very clever and that the individual who first introduced it to English-speaking EQ players should be commended.
▲ Page top
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2002 at 11:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759074608
8 posts
I thought uber was German for super
▲ Page top
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2002 at 1:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751405373
5 posts
It can mean either, I believe.

Its usage comes from many many years ago before EQ was even thought of. EQ was designed based on people playing LP and Diku muds...but they were preceded by other types of MUDS and one of them was AberMUD which was often called UberMUD.

I know the MUD community has been using 'uber' as a common slang for years and years.
▲ Page top
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2002 at 5:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253695055
39 posts


Edited, Sun Mar 24 05:02:10 2002
▲ Page top
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 12:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776714661
1 post
the right german word is über. means "above", or sometimes "over" something. dunno who introduced it into english, but its sometimes funny for what its used.
/edit/ and it doesnt mean super. super is super in german, no translation needed.

Edited, Mon Mar 11 12:14:08 2002
▲ Page top
RE: uber
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 4:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764595777
92 posts
Well I know the word was atleast re-introduced in the early 80's when "The Dead Kennedy's" realesed their album "In God we Trust, Inc." - with a great tune on it called "California Uber Alles", literally 'California Over All'... this was a political statement off of one of Hitlers favorite tunes (allthough I do not beleive it is Germany's national song...) Deutchsland Uber Alles.

thats what I know.

:)
▲ Page top
RE: über
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2002 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781490217
84 posts
Deutchsland Über Alles was a part of the german national song, but they removed it after the second world war and added another part. But the music is still the same as it was then, so it WAS a part of the national song.


------------------
Da Swedish Meatball
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 26 2001 at 4:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) whoever came up with the word uber should be shot, just giving my opinion, its so stupid
Not iksar wearable?
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2001 at 4:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763660706
61 posts
Am I the only one that finds it strange that an iksar Sk couldn't wear this? It appears to be a chain armor, which an iksar should be able to wear (judging by the graphic). Just seems pretty lame to exclude iksar from the quest armor that every other sk can get easilly.
▲ Page top
RE: Not iksar wearable?
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2002 at 8:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250473276
View User Forum
185 posts
There are many plate armors Iksar cannot wear...most really. Darkforge, sentient, and blood ember are all armor pieces that will never touch your scaley hide.

We do have our own dreadscale quests, the pieces are generally 2-3 ac lower than darkforge but the stats are just about identical. Its not bad stuff for chain armor and a couple pieces are really easy to get, compared to darkforge, which can seriously be a real PITA.

A good bp to watch out for is Treeweave, 25 ac 10 str and Ikky friendly...about the best there is until you can get your claws on some Barbed Ringmail or Shissar Scale Breastplate, then you're finally into some serious AC.

Playing an Iksar Shadowknight isn't easy, but its fun being one of the sturdier ****'s in EQ.
▲ Page top
RE: Not iksar wearable?
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2001 at 7:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771457819
3 posts
It's plate armor when worn Taloquin. The item graphic in the inventory window means nothing.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2002 at 2:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) best sk only armor is blood lords :P marginaly less ac than malevolant and WAY more hp (which is all that matters at that point in the game anyway), along with much better stats and saves. so pshhhh :P
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 21 2001 at 7:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) A Chitten shell is not needed in this quest, its for the Dreadscale Armor Quests, (Iksar SK quest armor). But... if you need an uncracked chitten shell you can go to the Field of Bone, (FoB), and kill a Larg Heartsing Scorpian, like level 20 or so. It's a common drop of them about one in three.
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 13 2000 at 9:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) So Does anyone know where the not cracked chittin shell is? Last I heard you can forage a "Cracked Chittin Shell" in FoB.
